front: What are the 6 Microsoft Responsible AI principles?
back: Fairness; Reliability & Safety; Privacy & Security; Inclusiveness; Transparency; Accountability

front: Which Responsible AI principle covers ensuring a system works well for people with disabilities?
Which Responsible AI principle covers explaining model decisions to users?
What AI workload identifies unusual data points in a dataset?
Which Azure service is used for knowledge mining over unstructured documents?
back: Azure AI Search (formerly Azure Cognitive Search)

front: What does 'document intelligence' workload do?
back: Extracts text, key-value pairs, tables, structure from forms/invoices/receipts

front: Define supervised learning
back: Training a model on labeled examples (features + known target)

front: Define unsupervised learning
back: Finding patterns in unlabeled data — e.g., clustering, anomaly detection

front: Which ML task predicts a continuous numeric value?
Which ML task predicts a category/class?
Which ML task groups similar items without labels?
What is the typical train/validation/test split?
What metric measures regression error magnitude in original units?
What metric is TP / (TP+FP)?
What metric is TP / (TP+FN)?
What is the F1 score?
back: Harmonic mean of precision and recall

front: What is a confusion matrix?
back: Table of TP / FP / FN / TN counts used to evaluate classification

front: What is overfitting?
back: Model memorizes training data; performs poorly on unseen data

front: Which Azure service offers no-code AutoML, designer, and managed compute?
back: Azure Machine Learning (Azure ML Studio at ml.azure.com)

front: Which Azure ML feature automatically tries algorithms and hyperparameters?
Which Azure ML feature is a drag-and-drop pipeline builder?
What is the unified service for image analysis, OCR, and spatial analysis on Azure?
Which service detects, recognizes, and analyzes human faces?
back: Azure AI Face (Azure AI Vision Face)

front: Which service extracts text, structure, and key-value pairs from forms?
back: Azure AI Document Intelligence (formerly Form Recognizer)

front: Which service indexes video for searchable insights (faces, keywords, sentiment)?
What is OCR?
back: Optical Character Recognition — extracting printed/handwritten text from images

front: Which Azure AI Vision feature describes an image with a sentence?
Which Azure service replaced Form Recognizer in name?
What is the unified text-analytics service on Azure?
Which AI Language feature returns positive/negative/neutral scores?
Which AI Language feature extracts people, places, organizations from text?
Which AI Language feature pulls out main topics/phrases?
Which Azure service handles speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and speech translation?
Which Azure service translates text between 100+ languages?
Which AI Language feature lets you build a knowledge base of Q&A pairs?
Which AI Language feature understands user intent and entities for chatbots?
Which Azure service hosts foundation models like GPT-4o and DALL·E?
Which Azure portal is the central hub for building generative AI apps?
back: Azure AI Foundry (formerly Azure AI Studio) at ai.azure.com

front: What is a 'token' in LLM context?
back: Unit of text (~4 characters EN) used for billing and context-window limits

front: What is prompt engineering?
back: Crafting input text to guide an LLM toward desired output

front: What is RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)?
back: Pattern that retrieves relevant docs (via search/embeddings) then passes them as LLM context to ground responses

front: What is the difference between Azure OpenAI and OpenAI direct?
back: Azure OpenAI adds enterprise security, regional hosting, RBAC, private networking, SLA, content filters

front: What is GitHub Copilot built on?
back: OpenAI Codex (initially) / GPT-4 family models, served via Azure OpenAI infrastructure

front: What is Microsoft 365 Copilot?
back: Generative AI assistant integrated into Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, Teams (M365 apps)

front: What is a 'system message' in chat completions?
back: Initial instruction defining model persona/behavior, sent before user messages

front: What is 'grounding' in generative AI?
back: Connecting model responses to real data sources (e.g., RAG) to reduce hallucination

front: What is a content filter in Azure OpenAI?
back: Automatic moderation for hate, sexual, violence, self-harm — applied to prompts and completions

front: Name a generative AI workload type besides text
back: Image generation (DALL·E), code generation (Codex/Copilot), audio (Whisper for speech-to-text)

front: Which generative AI principle relates to provenance / 'where did this content come from?'
What does NLP stand for?
Which metric, between Accuracy and F1, is better for imbalanced datasets?
back: F1 (because Accuracy can be misleadingly high when one class dominates)

front: What does PII redaction in Azure AI Language do?
back: Detects and masks Personally Identifiable Information in text (names, SSNs, etc.)

front: What is fine-tuning in Azure OpenAI?
back: Continuing training on a base model with your own labeled examples to specialize behavior
